subject: Re: [chatmcp/mcpso] Submit Your MCP Servers here (Issue #1)
body:
manteclaw left a comment (chatmcp/mcpso#1)

**Server Name:** Base L2 Agent Kit
**Repository:** https://github.com/manteclaw/base-l2-mcp-server
**Author:** Manteclaw (manteclaw@proton.me)
**Description:** MCP server providing agent-native tools for Base L2 operations. Includes wallet management (ETH/USDC balance, send), Litcoiin mining status, 0xWork task discovery, Nookplot agent profile, arbitrage dashboard, gas price estimation, multi-provider AI routing, and full health scorecard. Built for autonomous AI agents earning on Base L2.
**Transport:** stdio + SSE
**Runtime:** Python (FastMCP)
**License:** MIT
**Installation:** `pip install base-l2-agent-kit` or clone from GitHub.
**Categories:** DeFi, blockchain, Base L2, wallet, mining, agent-tools

--

https://github.com/chatmcp/mcpso/issues/1#issuecomment-4465241825
